title: kaori.reports.generated
description: F-038 Reports — fired by ai-orchestrator when a report run reaches a terminal state. Consumers (future): notification dispatcher fan-out, analytics rollup. Producer: services/ai-orchestrator/reports/service.py.

report_id.description: reports.report_id — UUID string. Joins back to the row for full content.

status.description: Terminal status only — queued / running rows do NOT emit. 'failed' carries last_error in the row, not in this event.

title.description: Optional — convenience copy of reports.title for consumers that don't want to re-query the row.

owner_email.description: Optional — convenience copy for the notification dispatcher.
